channel.title: XAUUSD News Feed (Merged)
channel.description: Latest XAUUSD headlines from investingLive, ForexLive, ForexCrunch, ActionForex, Investing.com, DailyForex, Kitco, Mining.com and Trading Economics

item.title: [TradingEconomics] Gold Eases Amid Middle East Uncertainty
[FXStreet] Gold Price Forecast: XAU/USD sellers retain control whilst below 21-day SMA near $4,650
item.description: Gold is back in the red around $4,550 in Asia on Tuesday, having faced rejection once again just shy of the $4,600 mark, as markets digest the latest developments around the conflict between the United States (US) and Iran.

item.title: [ActionForex] Gold Recovers Some Losses: What’s Driving the Market?
item.description: Gold rose to 4,600 USD per ounce on Tuesday, continuing its recovery from the previous session, and is now trading around 4,548 USD. Market sentiment was supported by hopes of a possible resumption of negotiations between the US and Iran, which has somewhat eased concerns over inflation and the ener

item.title: [FXStreet] Gold slides to late-March lows amid firm US Dollar and elevated Treasury yields
item.description: Gold (XAU/USD) trades on the back foot on Tuesday as traders closely monitor developments surrounding the US-Iran negotiations and amid a broad macroeconomic background linked to the prolonged conflict that continues to weigh on the precious metal.

item.title: [Kitco] Gold breaks below $4,540, silver tests $75 as yields rise, Hormuz talks cap oil - Kitco AM Report
[Kitco] Gold will hit $5,800 ATH by December, but silver has highest upside, platinum has breakout potential – MKS PAMP’s Shiels
[Mining.com] Barrick intensifies Ebola screening at Kibali gold mine after Congo outbreak
item.description: No workers had been infected, but the company was rolling out preventive measures in response to the outbreak.

item.title: [Kitco] Gold prices remain below $4,500 as U.S. pending home sales rise 1.4% in April
[Mining.com] Westgold sells Chalice project to Corazon for $18M
item.description: Upon completion, Westgold would emerge as a 19.9% shareholder of Corazon.

item.title: [Mining.com] Jeff Currie sees gold price pullback before $10,000 run
item.description: The former head of commodity research at Goldman Sachs revealed that he has been "short gold" since March.
